message:
data(audit): fresh-eyes messaging module audit + diff audits — 9 files, all SOUND

capability/tokens.rs, kafka_consumer.rs, local_queue.rs) + diff audit of sync/mutex.rs,
reactor/token.rs, trace/boundary.rs. 1 bug independently found (nats.rs error swallowing,
already fixed by concurrent agent in 8bcb318e). 9 files, 0 new bugs remaining.
